rankings.title: When the Monsoon Fails — Shift-Share Weather Shocks and Climate Beliefs in India (Google Trends + WVS)
conditions: a strong first stage
a convincing argument/diagnostics that national salience doesn’t drive the reduced form
a clear interpretation focusing on “attention” vs “belief” with persistence tests

rankings.title: Heat Waves and Environmental Concern — IMD Temperature + IHDS Panel
conditions: confirmed IHDS access + documented question wording
a design that leverages within-district high-frequency heat during survey windows rather than “change across waves”
a plan to separate income/agricultural-loss channels from pure belief updating

rankings.title: Flood Exposure and Climate Awareness — EM-DAT Disasters + Google Trends
Idea 1: When the Monsoon Fails — Shift-Share Weather Shocks and Climate Beliefs in India
conditions: dropping the Bartik instrument to use local weather shocks directly
validating Google Trends for Hindi/regional languages

rankings.title: Idea 2: Flood Exposure and Climate Awareness — EM-DAT Disasters + Google Trends
Idea 3: Heat Waves and Environmental Concern — IMD Temperature + IHDS Panel
When the Monsoon Fails — Shift-Share Weather Shocks and Climate Beliefs in India (Google Trends + WVS)
conditions: robust weak IV F-stats >10
placebo tests for non-agricultural outcomes
WVS state sample boosts

rankings.title: Heat Waves and Environmental Concern — IMD Temperature + IHDS Panel
conditions: confirming ICPSR access
reframing outcomes as mechanisms for global beliefs
